page_content:
NFSC698 Colloquium in Food Science (1 Credit)

Oral reports on special topics or recently published research in food science and technology. Distinguished scientists are invited as guest lecturers. A maximum of three credits allowed for the M.S.

Formerly: FDSC698.

NFSC699 Problems in Nutrition and Food Science (1-4 Credits)

Credit according to time scheduled and magnitude of problem. An experimental program on a topic other than the student's thesis problem will be conducted. Four credits shall be the maximum allowed toward an advanced degree.

Restriction: Permission of AGNR-Nutrition and Food Science department. Formerly: FDSC 699 and NUTR 699.
